title: Unified API Connector
description: Schema representing a connector in a unified API platform — a single integration mapping to one or more upstream third-party APIs normalized under a common data model.

connectorId.description: Unique identifier for the connector (slug, e.g., salesforce-crm)

name.description: Human-readable name of the connector (e.g., Salesforce)

description.description: Description of what the connector does and what data it normalizes

provider.description: The upstream API provider being connected (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot, QuickBooks)

providerUrl.description: URL to the upstream provider's API documentation

category.description: The unified API category this connector belongs to

authType.description: Authentication method used by the upstream provider

dataObjects.description: The normalized data objects this connector exposes

supportedOperations.description: CRUD operations supported by this connector

webhookSupport.description: Whether the connector supports real-time webhooks from the upstream provider

fieldMapping.description: Mapping of normalized field names to provider-specific field names

rateLimits.description: Known rate limits imposed by the upstream provider

sandboxAvailable.description: Whether a sandbox or test environment is available for this connector
